arts.ttl: How to watch Everton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Everton vs Wolves kicks off at 7.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7pm. The show begins about 30 minutes before kick-off at Goodison Park, bringing supporters team news and talking points before the 7.30pm start.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces nightmare Everton situation as Liverpool undroppable walks disciplinary tightrope
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be eager to win his first Merseyside derby at the weekend, but the Liverpool head coach could be without Alexis Mac Allister.

arts.ttl: Everton have ‘expressed interest’ in manager – Surprise move to Toffees now seen as ‘serious possibility’
arts.sum: Everton have ‘expressed interest’ in manager Sérgio Conceição and a move to Goodison Park is a ‘serious possibility’ at this moment in time. That’s according to O Jogo, who say the Friedkin Group have a ‘strong appreciation’ of the Portuguese coach as they look at alternatives to Sean Dyche. arts.ttl: Club’s move for Everton man depends on key factor – Indication that ‘Friedkins would play at home’
arts.sum: For many weeks, Everton’s Beto has been a major figure in the Italian rumour mill ahead of January. Yesterday, the Portuguese striker was linked with a move to Torino, who have apparently already started making moves for Beto.
